name: Kolacz Weselny (Sculpture Cake)
recipeIngredient: 2 packages active dry yeast (1/4 oz each)
1 cup unsalted butter or margarine, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cheese filling; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, dissolve yeast and 1 tablespoon sugar in 1/4 cup warm water. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes until foamy.
3. In a large bowl, combine granulated sugar, butter or margarine, and eggs. Beat until pale and fluffy.
4. Add the yeast mixture, warm milk, all-purpose flour, and salt. Beat until well blended.
5. Stir in enough remaining flour to make a soft dough. Turn out dough on a lightly floured surface.
6. Clean and grease a bowl. Knead dough until smooth and elastic.
7. Place dough in greased bowl, turning to coat all sides. Cover with a clean damp cloth.
8. Let rise in a warm place, free from drafts, until doubled in bulk.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Grease the side and bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
11. Divide dough into thirds. Using your hands, gently press 1/3 of dough evenly over the bottom and side of the pan.
12. Evenly spread cheese filling over the dough-lined pan.
13. On a lightly floured surface, roll out another 1/3 of dough to a 10-inch circle. Place it over the cheese filling.
14. Gently pat with your hands.
15. Using a pastry brush, lightly brush milk over the top of the dough.
16. Cut the remaining 1/3 of dough into 4 even pieces. Shape 3 pieces into long ropes and braid them. Apply to the outer edge of the cake.
17. Using the remaining dough, cut desired figures with various cutters or form shapes with your hands. Arrange figures on top as desired.
18. Lightly brush milk over the top.
19. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool cake in the pan for 5 minutes on a rack. Remove the side of the pan and cool completely on a rack. Makes 1 (10-inch) cake.
Cheese Filling:
1. Process cheese with a grinder or food processor. Do not puree or over-process.
2. In a large bowl, combine egg yolks, granulated sugar, and vanilla sugar. Beat until pale and creamy, at least 10 minutes.
3. Add ground cheese a little at a time while beating. Beat until smooth.
